videos.headline: Oklahoma grabs pick-six, 2-point conversion to take lead over Auburn
videos.description: Oklahoma takes a 63-yard interception return to the house, and Michael Hawkins Jr. puts his body on the line to successfully grab the 2-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma grabs pick-six, 2-point conversion to take lead over Auburn) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Hawkins Jr. sprints in for a 48-yard Oklahoma TD
videos.description: Michael Hawkins Jr. escapes the pressure and rushes up the middle for a 48-yard touchdown to give Oklahoma a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Hawkins Jr. sprints in for a 48-yard Oklahoma TD) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Keandre Lambert hauls in a contested TD catch for Auburn
videos.description: Keandre Lambert catches the pass from Payton Thorne to tie the score for Auburn vs. Oklahoma.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Keandre Lambert hauls in a contested TD catch for Auburn) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Payton Thorne slings a 48-yard TD pass for Auburn
videos.description: Payton Thorne finds Malcolm Simmons over the top to give Auburn a 14-7 lead over Oklahoma.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Payton Thorne slings a 48-yard TD pass for Auburn) 2024/09/28 ESHEET
